prompt: Create an ultra-luxury editorial fashion portrait of a young Black man with short close-cropped hair, smooth medium-brown skin, symmetrical features, and a calm confident expression in a dark high-fashion studio. Full-body vertical composition, subject centered slightly to the right, looking directly into the camera with a poised, self-assured gaze. He wears an all-black tailored outfit: fitted open-collar dress shirt, high-waisted pleated trousers, polished black loafers, and a black suit jacket draped over his right shoulder while his right hand holds the lapel near his collarbone. His left hand rests casually on the back of a single black leather lounge chair positioned on the lower left side of the frame. Pose him standing with one leg crossed elegantly in front of the other, relaxed but powerful editorial stance. Use a seamless charcoal-gray to black studio backdrop with subtle vignette, soft floor shadow, and refined low-key lighting: large soft key light from front-left, gentle fill to preserve facial detail, controlled highlights on the chair leather and shoes, rich blacks with visible fabric texture. Style should feel like a premium fashion magazine cover or luxury menswear campaign, minimalist, expensive, cinematic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture, clean grooming, no jewelry, no visible logos, no text, no watermark. Use a vertical 4:5 aspect ratio, full-body framing with the chair fully visible, sophisticated monochrome palette, elegant contrast, professional studio photography quality.
